assetSearch.title: Token search
assetSearch.description: Search by asset code, issuer address, or the exact CODE:ISSUER combination.

help.issuer: The Stellar account that issued this token. Code and issuer together uniquely identify the asset.
help.trustlines: Number of accounts that have a trustline to this asset according to Horizon. This is a usage signal, not proof of authenticity.
help.totalAmount: Total amount of this asset reported by Horizon - trustlines, claimable balances, liquidity pools, and contracts combined. Supply alone says nothing about quality or trustworthiness.
help.trustlineStatus: Shows whether your current account can already hold this asset.
help.trustlineBalance: Current balance of this asset on your trustline.
help.trustlineLimit: Maximum balance of this asset your account may hold through this trustline.
help.authorization: For auth_required assets, the issuer must authorize your trustline before you can receive or trade the token.
help.homeDomain: Domain stored on the issuer account. It helps locate the stellar.toml file.
help.issuerMasterWeight: Weight of the issuer master key. 0 means the master key alone can no longer sign.
help.issuerLocked: Shows whether the issuer master key is still active. "Actively managed" is normal for ongoing projects like stablecoins and is not a warning. "Fully locked" is a positive signal for tokens that promise immutability. "Appears locked" means the master key is disabled, but other signers could still control the account.
help.tomlStatus: Status of the stellar.toml file under the issuer home domain.
help.tomlUrl: Address of the discovered stellar.toml file.
help.tomlAssetListed: Shows whether this asset is listed in the CURRENCIES entries of the stellar.toml.
help.tomlCurrencyCount: Number of CURRENCIES entries in the stellar.toml.
help.authRequired: The issuer must authorize trustlines individually.
help.authRevocable: The issuer can later revoke an existing authorization.
help.authImmutable: The issuer authorization flags can no longer be changed.
help.clawbackEnabled: The issuer can reclaim tokens from accounts under certain rules.
help.liquidityRoute: Shows whether a route was found for the current swap direction.
help.reserveIncrease: Additional XLM minimum reserve locked by creating a new trustline.
help.reserveAfter: Estimated minimum balance that must remain on the account after adding the trustline.
help.spendableAfter: Estimated XLM balance still freely available after the additional reserve.
help.expected: Estimated received amount from the current quote.
help.minimum: Minimum amount after slippage tolerance. The swap is aborted below this amount.
help.route: Asset path Stellar would use for the swap.
help.effectiveRate: Expected actual rate based on sent amount and received amount.
help.minimumRate: Worst accepted rate after slippage tolerance.
help.slippageBuffer: Difference between expected quote and minimum amount.
help.hops: Number of market segments in the route.
help.quoteAge: Age of the currently displayed quote. Older quotes should be refreshed before signing.
help.routeDetailed: Route with asset code and shortened issuer so same-code tokens remain distinguishable.
help.spread: Difference between best bid and best ask.
help.priceImpact: Estimate of how much the trade worsens the achieved price compared with the market price.
help.topDepth: Sum of the first five ask levels in the order book.
help.marketAge: Age of the loaded market data.
help.bestBid: Highest current buy offer in the order book.
help.bestAsk: Lowest current sell offer in the order book.
help.depthCoversAmount: Shows whether the visible top order-book depth covers the entered amount.
help.poolCount: Number of AMM liquidity pools found for this trading pair.
help.limitOfferDirection: Defines which asset you sell and which asset you want to receive.
help.limitOfferAmount: Amount of the asset you want to sell in the limit order.
help.limitOfferPrice: Price per 1 sold asset, denominated in the bought asset.
help.expertDirectory: Cross-check against the publicly maintained directory at stellar.expert (a third party). A listing is only a hint, not a proof of authenticity or safety. A missing listing is likewise no indication of fraud. Always verify the issuer address via the issuer’s official website as well.

actions.trustlineNext: Next step: create trustline from search result
actions.swapNext: Select asset and open swap preview

trustlineStatus.label: Trustline status
trustlineStatus.error: Trustline status could not be loaded

swapPreview.title: Swap preview
swapPreview.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount in {{asset}}.
swapPreview.invalidSlippage: Please enter slippage between 0 and 50 percent.
swapPreview.invalidTarget: Please search and select a destination token or enter it exactly as CODE:ISSUER.
swapPreview.sameAsset: Source and destination must not be the same asset.
swapPreview.destinationTrustlineMissing: The destination token trustline is still missing on this account.
swapPreview.destinationTrustlineUnauthorized: The destination trustline is not authorized by the issuer yet.
swapPreview.minimumMissing: The minimum amount could not be calculated.
swapPreview.failed: Swap preview could not be loaded.
swapPreview.quoteWorseThanMinimum: The refreshed route is below the confirmed minimum amount. Please check the price again.

swapConfirm.title: Confirm swap
swapConfirm.routeRefresh: The route is checked again directly before signing. If the refreshed quote is below the confirmed minimum shown here, signing will not continue.

market.title: Orderbook / AMM
market.failed: Market data could not be loaded.

limitOffer.title: Limit orders
limitOffer.description: Place an offer in the Stellar orderbook. It stays open until it is filled, replaced, or deleted. Every open offer increases the minimum reserve.
limitOffer.warning: This order can be partially or fully filled immediately if a matching counter-offer exists. Check price and direction before signing.
limitOffer.cancelWarning: This deletes the open offer by replacing it with amount 0.
limitOffer.noOffers: No open offers found for this token.
limitOffer.loadFailed: Open offers could not be loaded.
limitOffer.invalidPair: This limit order is missing a valid asset pair.
limitOffer.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid selling amount in {{asset}}.
limitOffer.invalidPrice: Please enter a valid price greater than 0.

trustlineConfirm.title: Confirm trustline
trustlineConfirm.warning: A trustline allows this asset to be held in your account. Check the facts, especially issuer, home domain, stellar.toml, authorization, and clawback before signing.

trustlineFlow.title: Prepare trustline
trustlineFlow.limitHelp: The limit is the maximum token balance on this trustline. It is not a buy order and does not reserve tokens.
trustlineFlow.authRequiredHint: This asset uses auth_required. The trustline can be created, but the issuer must authorize it before you can receive or buy the token via swap.
trustlineFlow.combinedWarning: This transaction creates the trustline first and executes the swap afterwards. The route is checked again directly before signing.
trustlineFlow.combinedOnlyXlm: The combined flow is only available for XLM -> token here.
trustlineFlow.authRequiredCombinedBlocked: Combined trustline+swap is disabled for auth_required assets because the issuer must authorize the new trustline first.
trustlineFlow.invalidLimit: Please enter a valid trustline limit greater than 0.
trustlineFlow.limitBelowExpected: The trustline limit is below the expected received amount.
trustlineFlow.alreadyPresent: The trustline already exists now. Please reload and use the normal swap.
trustlineFlow.combinedSuccess: Trustline and swap were executed. Transaction:

facts.title: Token facts
facts.disclaimer: This is not a rating or recommendation. The app only shows found data; the decision stays with the user.
facts.issuerLoadFailed: Issuer account could not be loaded.

toml.noHomeDomain: No home domain on issuer account

expert.label: StellarExpert directory
expert.notListed: Not in the directory - this says nothing about authenticity; many reputable assets are not listed there.
expert.unavailable: StellarExpert not reachable - the hint could not be loaded.
expert.notChecked: Not checked (the directory only covers the public network).

risk.title: Checks before signing
risk.issuerLoadFailed: Issuer data could not be loaded.
risk.noHomeDomain: The issuer has no home domain.
risk.tomlNotLoaded: The stellar.toml is not loaded or not reachable.
risk.tomlAssetMissing: This asset is not listed in the issuer's stellar.toml.
risk.issuerUnlocked: The issuer master key is not locked.
risk.clawbackEnabled: Clawback is enabled for this asset.
risk.issuerAppearsLocked: Warning: the master key is disabled, but other signers could still control the issuer account. It is not actually locked.
risk.authRevocable: The issuer can revoke a granted authorization and freeze your balance of this token.
risk.expertFlagged: Warning: this issuer is flagged as harmful in the StellarExpert directory ({{tags}}). Adding a trustline, buying, or swapping is strongly discouraged.

detail.nextStepHint: Known in Horizon only. Check issuer and trust before signing a trustline or swap.

result.qualityHint: Note: Trustlines together with domain and TOML are more meaningful. The total amount is shown in the details, but it is not an authenticity signal.

columnHelp.numAccounts: Number of trustlines/accounts according to Horizon.
columnHelp.amount: Total amount of this asset reported by Horizon. If Horizon returns authorization buckets, they are summed.

factLabels.domain: Issuer account has a home domain
factLabels.toml: Asset is listed in this issuer's stellar.toml

result.duplicateCodeWarning: Warning: {{codes}} has multiple results from different issuers. The code alone says nothing about authenticity - only the issuer address does. Compare it carefully before adding a trustline or swapping.
result.duplicateCodeBadge: {{count}} different issuers use this asset code.

invalidInput.queryMissing: Please enter an asset code, issuer address, or CODE:ISSUER.
invalidInput.queryInvalid: Please enter a valid asset code, issuer address, or CODE:ISSUER.
invalidInput.codeInvalid: Asset codes may only contain 1 to 12 letters/numbers.
invalidInput.issuerInvalid: Please enter a valid Stellar issuer address.

failed.generic: The asset search has failed. Please try again later.

ambiguousResult.title: Status unclear – do not resend
ambiguousResult.body: The last transaction could not be confirmed unambiguously by the server (timeout or server error). Please check the transaction hash in an explorer before trying again.
